name: Low Poly Forces
short_description: LOW POLY FORCES is made with COMMUNITY FEEDBACK as the ULTIMATE LOW POLY SHOOTER Players can master their skills like our unique Movement and show off their strategies in a wide range of maps and modes. Customize your Arsenal with New Attachments and Weapons to unlock as you progress in the game.
detailed_description:
Low Poly Forces created by Matt Sowards is a fast paced Shooter. Players can master their skills like Recoil, Movement Speed, and show off their strategies in a wide range of game maps, modes, and weapons to choose from. Customize your guns, attachments and face off against players worldwide! Host Servers, Play Local or multiplayer, Play the way you want! Never a pay to win model. Community Feedback and love.


Custom Game Creation to play how you want
Weapons: Grenades, SMGs, Shotguns, Snipers, Rifles, Pistols, and more!
Unique Weapon Stats, Assault Rifles, SMG, and so on all have their own respectful recoils, different bullets, attachments, ect.
Options for every FPS you will love, Toggle aiming, crouching, fov sliders and so on.
Fun Parkour mechanic used with double jumping but dont worry! its not overpowed, its very fun and efficient to use.
Developed 100% by community love, 100% real honest gamer, 100% guarentee we're doing our best to make this a fun and exciting new fps.
